calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2024 Set For Trial On Oct-02-24 At 11:15 A.M. In Dept 305

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-02-2024 Continued To Oct-02-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-02-2024 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Katherine B. Bearman, Esq. on behalf of Keanway Kyi Appellant/Defendant whois present.
Witness Brian Cauley who is Chief Claims for the City and County of San Francisco is present.
David E. Ramirez, Respondent/Plaintiff is present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

David E. Ramirez, Respondent/Plaintiff testifies on his own behalf.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:

Exhibit #1 - Instructions and Claim against City and County of San Francisco dated
April 2, 2024
Exhibit #2 - Letter from City and County of SF to Mr. Ramirez returning claim due to lateness of application Dated Aprl 5, 2024.
Exhibit #3 - Application For Leave to Present a Late Claim Dated 4/12/24
EXhibit #4 - Letter of DENIAL for Claim Application Dated 4/15/24
Exhibit #5 - Letter from GEICO insurance to Defendant Keanway Kyi re investigation of the accident Dated 10/11/23
Exhibit #6 - Set of 8x10 Photographs (10 total)

Katherine B. Bearman, Esq. on behalf of Keanway Kyi Appellant/Defendant presents Opening Statements.

Ms. Bearman calls her first witness to the stand: Keanway Kyi Appellant/Defendant and conducts direct examination.
No further questions from Respondent/Plaintiff. Witness is thanked and excused.

Ms. Bearman calls next witness to the stand: Brian Cauley and conducts direct examination.

The following documentary evidence is introduced:
One White Binder with Exhibits #1-9
Exhibit #1 - Claim Against the City and County of San Francisco Attachment
Exhibit #2 - Letter from City and County of SF to Mr. Ramirez returning claim due to lateness of application Dated Aprl 5, 2024.
Exhibit #3 - Application For Leave to Present a Late Claim Dated 4/12/24
Exhibit #4 - Letter of DENIAL for Claim Application Dated 4/15/24

Mr. Ramirez conducts cross-examination of the witness.
Ms. Bearman conducts redirect examination of the witness.
No further questions from Ms. Bearman or Mr. Ramirez.

Ms. Bearman presents Closing Arguments.

The Court retains all exhibits.
At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss, Clerk: R. Gumpal, Not reported, (305).

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-26-2024 Judgment Entered
